setup_commands.brave-search: claude-workspace mcp add brave-search --scope user --api-key BRAVE_API_KEY -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search

notes.brave-search: Recommended scope: user (personal API key, useful across all projects). You will be prompted to enter your BRAVE_API_KEY securely. Get a free API key at https://brave.com/search/api/
